basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 44 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://jkicds.com. A total of 44 vacancies have been announced through the JK Anganwadi Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Sangini (Anganwadi Worker): 10+2 pass and maximum graduation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JK Anganwadi Sangini Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the JK Anganwadi Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) posts is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 44 vacancies announced for the Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) positions in the Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is 10+2 pass. Candidates can also apply if they have completed graduation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 37 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it manually.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for JK Anganwadi Sangini posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit, specifically on the marks obtained in the 10+2 examinations.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be paid on an honorarium basis, as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) under the POSHAN Project in Baramulla.

faq.question: Q10. Where should the application form be submitted?
faq.answer: The completed application form along with required documents should be submitted to the Office of the Child Development Project Officer Narvaw.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for JK Anganwadi Sangini Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the JK Anganwadi Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) posts is 15th July 2026.
